annotations.selectionHint: Use for exploratory lookup when you may combine free-text discovery with filters and only need shallow pagination.

description: Discover agreements with text query and page-based results. Supports the same structured agreement filters as list_agreements, including counsel filters, but is best suited for interactive discovery rather than bulk exact retrieval.

acquirer_pe.description: Boolean-like PE filter values encoded as strings.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor from a previous agreements listing response.

include_xml.description: When true, include full agreement XML for each result.

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return.

query.description: Optional prefix search over target and acquirer names, or a 4-digit year string.

target_pe.description: Boolean-like PE filter values encoded as strings.

name: search_agreements

annotations.selectionHint: Use for clause-language retrieval, taxonomy searches, and agreement-section sampling.

description: Search sections across the corpus when you are looking for clause language patterns or taxonomy matches.

acquirer.description: Exact acquirer company names to include.

acquirer_pe.description: Boolean-like PE filter values encoded as strings.

metadata.description: Agreement metadata fields to include under results[].metadata.

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return.

standard_id.description: Clause type taxonomy standard IDs (Clause Type in the Search UI). Parent IDs expand to include descendant taxonomy nodes.

target.description: Exact target company names to include.

target_pe.description: Boolean-like PE filter values encoded as strings.

name: search_sections

annotations.selectionHint: Use when filters are already known and you expect to paginate deeply or export exact result sets.

description: Retrieve agreements with exact structured filters and cursor pagination. Prefer this over search_agreements for bulk exact retrieval, especially when filters are already known.

acquirer_pe.description: Boolean-like PE filter values encoded as strings.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor from a previous list_agreements call.

include_xml.description: When true, include full agreement XML. Requires agreements:read_fulltext.

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return.

target_pe.description: Boolean-like PE filter values encoded as strings.

name: list_agreements

annotations.selectionHint: Use after identifying an agreement and before calling get_section on one section UUID.

description: Navigate the sections inside one agreement before drilling into a specific section.
name: list_agreement_sections

annotations.selectionHint: Use when you already know the exact agreement UUID and need the agreement payload or XML.

description: Fetch one agreement document, returning redacted XML unless full-text scope is present.

focus_section_uuid.description: Optional section UUID used when redacting anonymous responses to keep a focused neighborhood visible.

neighbor_sections.description: Number of neighboring sections to include around `focus_section_uuid` when response XML is redacted.

name: get_agreement

annotations.selectionHint: Use when you already have a section UUID and want the exact section payload.

description: Fetch one section directly by section UUID when you already know the exact section to inspect.
name: get_section

annotations.selectionHint: Use for agreement-level tax clause extraction once you know the agreement UUID.

description: Fetch extracted tax-module clauses for a specific agreement.
name: get_agreement_tax_clauses

annotations.selectionHint: Use for section-level tax clause extraction when you already have a section UUID.

description: Fetch extracted tax-module clauses for a specific section.
name: get_section_tax_clauses

annotations.selectionHint: Use first when you need canonical filter values or need to translate plural catalog groups into retrieval parameter names.

description: List valid filter values for agreement and section retrieval. Catalog groups are pluralized, while retrieval arguments are singular, for example target_counsels maps to target_counsel.
name: list_filter_options

annotations.selectionHint: Use for operational monitoring and to see which MCP tools are slow or error-prone.

description: Return in-process MCP metrics, including per-tool call counts, latency buckets, error categories, and auth-failure counts since process start.
name: get_server_metrics

annotations.selectionHint: Use when you need a machine-readable guide to tool choice, filters, scopes, and supported workflows.

description: Explain available MCP tools, selection guidance, pagination styles, scope requirements, and example workflows for this server.
name: get_server_capabilities

annotations.selectionHint: Use when you need valid standard_id values for section taxonomy filtering.

description: Fetch the clause taxonomy tree used for section search standard IDs.
name: get_clause_taxonomy

annotations.selectionHint: Use when you need tax-clause taxonomy ids before calling a tax-clause retrieval tool.

description: Fetch the tax clause taxonomy tree used for tax-clause research.
name: get_tax_clause_taxonomy

annotations.selectionHint: Use when you need canonical firm names before counsel-filtered agreement or section retrieval.

description: Fetch canonical counsel names for filter selection and normalization.
name: get_counsel_catalog

annotations.selectionHint: Use when you need canonical industry labels before industry-filtered retrieval.

description: Fetch NAICS sectors and subsectors for industry reasoning and filter selection.
name: get_naics_catalog

annotations.selectionHint: Use for top-level corpus sizing before deeper analysis.

description: Fetch high-level corpus counts for agreements, sections, and pages.
name: get_agreements_summary

annotations.selectionHint: Use for aggregated corpus analytics rather than document retrieval.

description: Fetch ownership and industry trend analytics for the agreement corpus.
name: get_agreement_trends
